---
title: ""
about:
  template: trestles
  image: profile_picture.jpg
---

```{=html}
<style>
/* 1. Global Colors and Background */
body {
  background-color: #f7f2e8 !important;
  color: #24292e !important;
}

/* 2. Page Layout & Width */
.quarto-container {
  max-width: 1400px !important;
}

.quarto-about-trestles {
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 4fr !important; 
  gap: 3em;
  align-items: start !important;
}

/* 3. Sidebar (Left Column) */
.about-links {
  display: none !important; /* Hides the extra LinkedIn/Email buttons */
}

.about-entity {
  text-align: center;
  margin-left: -80px !important;
}

.about-entity::after {
  content: "Henrique Santos";
  display: block;
  margin-top: 15px;
  font-weight: 700;
  font-size: 1.5rem;
  color: #1b4965;
}

/* 4. Content Area (Right Column) */
#title-block-header { margin-bottom: 0.5em !important; }
.about-contents { margin-top: -20px !important; }

h2 {
  color: #1b4965 !important;
  font-weight: 700;
  border-bottom: 2px solid #1b4965;
  padding-bottom: 10px;
  margin-top: 0 !important;
}

p {
  margin-bottom: 15px !important;
  line-height: 1.4 !important;
}

/* 5. Keyword Badges Style - Updated for a sleeker look */
.keyword-badge {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;      /* Centers vertically */
  justify-content: center;   /* Centers horizontally */
  background-color: #1b4965;
  color: #f7f2e8;
  border-radius: 30px;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  text-align: center;
  height: 50px;             /* Fixed height */
  line-height: 1.2;         /* Normalizes text height */
  padding: 0 15px;          /* Only horizontal padding */
}

/* This is the secret: it removes the bottom margin Quarto adds to text */
.keyword-badge p, 
.keyword-badge div {
  margin: 0 !important;
  padding: 0 !important;
}

.dna-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 15px;
  max-width: 650px;
  margin-top: 25px;
}
</style>
```

## The Bridge Between Science and Story

I am a **PhD Candidate** in Developmental Psychology at the **University of California, Santa Cruz**, working within the **CRECE Lab**. My research is driven by a fundamental question: *How can animation be a tool for children's learning and development?*

By combining my background in developmental science with storytelling, I investigate how media sparks the parent-child conversations that help children navigate complex concepts.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Research DNA

::::::: dna-grid
::: keyword-badge
Children Development
:::

::: keyword-badge
Animated Films
:::

::: keyword-badge
Parent-Child Conversations
:::

::: keyword-badge
Cross-Cultural Perspectives
:::
:::::::
